selected_topic: Independence From Meat Day, Indivisible Day, International Cherry Pit Spitting Day
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao staging a spectacular street showdown at an old-fashioned Independence Day cookout turned vegetable arena, where cherry pits fly like tiny missiles, and a giant carrot stands as the grand prize trophy.
image_prompt: Square Instagram illustration featuring Hunk Mao as a dynamic, athletic orange tabby cat in a black hoodie and cool sneakers, in mid-leap with a mischievous grin, launching a cherry pit like a pro spitter. Foreground shows a rustic summer picnic table with a giant cartoonish carrot trophy, and colorful veggies like corn, peas, and beans arranged like a victory wreath. Midground has a packed cheering crowd of various animals — squirrels with picnic baskets, rabbits with hats, birds with sunglasses — all animated and excited. Background has a festive backyard setting with bunting flags showing tiny fun icons like cherry pits, legumes, and a broken grill with a 'meat-free' sign. Hidden easter eggs include a tiny orange tabby shadow boxing a cherry pit, a covert veggie spy camera disguised as a tomato, a squirrel photographer snapping the moment, and punny small details like cherry bombs and peas in a pod GPS devices. Required text only: "FIGHT MEAT", "SPIT WIN", "VEGGIE POWER" rendered in bold block letters on hanging banners above the scene. The image is rich with playful energy, vibrant colors, and clever symbolism to highlight Independence From Meat Day, Indivisible Day, and International Cherry Pit Spitting Day as a unified fun metaphor.
easter_eggs: Hunk Mao's cap pin shaped like a carrot
Tiny cherry pit world record measurement tape on picnic table edge
Rabbit holding a 'No Meat' protest sign
A tomato disguised as a surveillance camera
A small veggie band playing pea-pod instruments
Shadow of a cat practicing spitting cherry pits
Broken grill with a cute 'meat-free zone' badge
Peas in a pod GPS devices showing hidden routes
Tiny cherry bombs on a side table
A hidden statue of liberty carrot
Miniature flags with a cherry motif flying in background
caption: Who needs meat when you can spit cherry pits for glory? Hunk Mao’s veggie showdown just dropped the mic and the seeds.
risk_notes: No financial, political, or investment advice; playful metaphor only.
